text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #3)
> Over to maintainer of java/eclipse (java/eclipse-devel was removed after
> java/eclipse was updated to version 4.3.2)
> 
> Jimmy, is this PR valid for java/eclipse or can we close it?

This would not be valid for the new java/eclipse.  Close it.
